Name: Testery - Create Environment
Description: Create an environment in your Testery account

Parameters.Name: TesteryToken
Parameters.Label: Token
Parameters.HelpText: API token for your account. Found under Settings > Integrations

Parameters.Name: TesteryName
Parameters.Label: Name
Parameters.HelpText: The display name for the environment

Parameters.Name: TesteryKey
Parameters.Label: Key
Parameters.HelpText: The unique identifier for the environment

Parameters.Name: TesteryMaximumParallelTestRuns
Parameters.Label: Maximum Parallel Test Run
Parameters.HelpText:
The maximum number of test runs that can run in parallel on this environment.
Default is 0 (no limit).

Parameters.Name: TesteryPipelineStage?
Parameters.Label: Pipeline Stage?
Parameters.HelpText: The name of a pipeline stage to associate this environment to.

Parameters.Name: TesteryVariables?
Parameters.Label: Variables?
Parameters.HelpText:
Add variable to the environment. Specified as "KEY=VALUE". To encrypt value, pass in "secure:KEY=VALUE", Multiple variables can be provided. Put each variable on a separate line.

Example:
```
FOO=BAR
secure:HELLO=WORLD
```

Parameters.Name: TesteryExistsExitCode
Parameters.Label: Fail if already exists?
Parameters.HelpText: Mark if you want the step to fail if the environment already exists
